alkylation concentration: buffer containing 50 mM Tris-acetate pH 7.0, 150 mM NaCl, 20 mM IAM
cleavage agent: digested overnight with Trypsin/Lys-C (1:20 w/w, Promega)
collision energy: MS/MS was performed using higher energy C-Trap dissociation with a collision energy of 30 ± 5%
fragmentation method: MS/MS was performed using higher energy C-Trap dissociation
instrument: coupled to a Fusion Lumos high-resolution accurate mass tandem mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled to a Fusion Lumos high-resolution accurate mass tandem mass spectrometer (ThermoFisher Scientific) via a nano-electrospray flex ion source
labeling: SILAC-based quantitative mass spectrometry on the DTT-eluted fraction
reduction reagent: This complex is reducible by DTT
reduction concentration: Samples were eluted by 30 min incubation with 15 mM DTT
